Get Started

Cloud Hosting
Built for Speed

Deploy your applications on our high-performance infrastructure. Ultra-fast NVMe storage, global CDN, and enterprise-grade DDoS protection — all managed from one dashboard.

Start Free Trial Explore Features
FEATURES

Everything you need to ship fast

Our infrastructure is designed for modern applications — from static sites to complex microservices.

Lightning Performance

NVMe SSD storage, HTTP/3, and edge caching deliver sub-second page loads globally.

Enterprise Security

Free SSL/TLS, WAF, automated backups, and real-time DDoS mitigation included on every plan.

Global Edge Network

30+ data centers across 6 continents. Your content is always close to your users.

Git Deployments

Push to deploy. Automatic builds from GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket with zero configuration.

Intuitive Dashboard

Manage domains, databases, and deployments from a single, beautiful control panel.

Auto Scaling

Seamlessly handle traffic spikes. Scale from zero to millions of requests without manual intervention.

PRICING

Simple, transparent pricing

No hidden fees. No surprises. Choose the plan that fits your scale.

Starter

Perfect for personal projects and small sites.

฿ 99 /mo
  • 1 Website
  • 10 GB NVMe Storage
  • Free SSL Certificate
  • 100 GB Bandwidth
  • Email Support

Pro

  • 10 Websites

  • Unlimited Bandwidth
  • Priority Support
